zh.lifeSummary: 當Siemowit III Piast於1320年出生時，他的父親Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk36歲，母親Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia27歲。他和Eufemia Přemyslovna至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1381年6月16日享年61歲，埋葬在波蘭華利札福斯吉波維亞特 沃吉沃可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Siemowit III Piast于1320年出生时，他的父亲Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk36岁，母亲Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia27岁。他和Eufemia Přemyslovna至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1381年6月16日享年61岁，埋葬在波兰華利札福斯吉波維亞特 沃吉沃可。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Siemowit III Piast was born in 1320, his father, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, was 36 and his mother, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Eufemia Přemyslovna. He died on 16 June 1381, at the age of 61, and was buried in Płock, Płock County, Warsaw, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Siemowit III Piast est né en 1320, son père, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Eufemia Přemyslovna. Il est décédé le 16 juin 1381, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Płock, Powiat płocki, warszawskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Siemowit III Piast 1320 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk 36 und seine Mutter Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia 27. Er hatte mit Eufemia Přemyslovna mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Juni 1381 im Alter von 61 Jahren und wurde in Płock, Powiat płocki, Warschau, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Siemowit III Piast è nato il nel 1320, il suo padre, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Eufemia Přemyslovna. Morì il 16 giugno 1381, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Płock, Powiat płocki, warszawskie, Polonia.

ja.Płock Cathedral, Płock, Miasto Płock, Ma: ポーランドワーッザウスキポウィアト プlオクイプlオック
ja.lifeSummary: Siemowit III Piastが1320年に生まれた時，父Trojden I Piast Duke of Czerskは36歳，母Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galiciaは27歳であった。彼はEufemia Přemyslovnaとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1381年6月16日に61歳で死去し，ポーランドワーッザウスキポウィアト プlオクイプlオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Siemowit III Piast(이)가 1320년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Eufemia Přemyslovna(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 6월 16일 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 워스자w스키 파위앳 pl옥키 pl옥크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Siemowit III Piast nasceu em 1320, seu pai, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Eufemia Přemyslovna. Ele faleceu em 16 de junho de 1381, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Płock, Powiat płocki, warszawskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siemowit III Piast родился в 1320 г., его отцу по имени Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Eufemia Přemyslovna. Он умер 16 июня 1381 г. в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Плоцк, Плоцкий повят, варсзавски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Siemowit III Piast nació en 1320, su papá, Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Eufemia Přemyslovna. Murió el 16 de junio de 1381, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Płock, Powiat płocki, warszawskie, Polonia.
